title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at BHIVE Workspace

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at BHIVE Workspace
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!
